operation_mapping.navigate_page: Map Claude Code browser-capable tools to result, product, and supplier page navigation
operation_mapping.read_visible_content: Use only visible page content for evidence capture
operation_mapping.open_supplier_or_product_link: Follow shortlisted links inside the active Claude Code workflow

constraints: This adapter is documented but not yet validated in a real Claude Code host.
notes: Validation is still required before claiming live host support.
